description: Recherche sur le design produit et UX de la montre à gousset AI

userStories.title: Benchmark design montres à gousset
userStories.description: Analyser les designs existants et tendances
userStories.notes: 22 références collectées incluant Patek Philippe, Breguet, MB&F, Urwerk, De Bethune. Tendances 2024-2025: heritage revival, fume gradients, titanium/ceramic materials, asymmetry.

userStories.title: Design industriel concept
userStories.description: Définir les grandes lignes du design produit
userStories.notes: 3 directions: Heritage Reimagined, Avant-Garde Portal, Minimal Artifact. Dimensions: 48-52mm, 12-15mm thick. Matériaux: Grade 5 titanium, ceramic, sapphire. Mécanisme: spring-loaded hunter avec dampening.

userStories.title: UX et interactions
userStories.notes: 4 modes: crown/buttons, touch, voice, gesture. Flux: quick time check, AI query, notifications, timer. Micro-interactions: lid open/close, AI listening pulse, haptic confirmations. Accessibility: screen reader, high contrast, large text, voice control.

userStories.title: UI et interface visuelle
userStories.notes: Style: Neo-Heritage (classic meets digital). Palette: Deep Black, Warm White, Champagne Gold, Royal Blue. Typo: Custom Breguet-inspired numerals + Helvetica-style sans. Icons: 2px stroke, outlined, 24x24 grid.

userStories.title: Packaging et unboxing
userStories.notes: Concept 'The Ritual': 4-tier reveal (sleeve, box, presentation, accessories). Matériaux: FSC kraft, recycled cardboard, molded paper pulp, organic cotton. Features: slow-release hinges, magnetic closure, AR experience. Coût: $41-66 USD.
